ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, HERBERT O

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, A. A. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-02-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 02 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-08-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE CARLOS LAROCHE PLTF. IN PRO PER DEFT IN PROPER 2:55 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, BOTH IN PROPER. IN CHAMBERS, CASE SETTLED, TERMS PUT ON RECORD BY COURT AS FOLLOWS: PARTIES AGREED THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES, LOCATED AT 1384 MCALLISTER ST, #1-A SF. EVICTION STAYED UNTIL 10/2/93 5PM. IF DEFT PAYS THE ARREARS OF $2,507.44, PLUS $13.16 FROM 8/12/93 ON OR BEFORE L0/2/93 PLTF. WILL SET ASIDE JUDGMENT & DEFT CAN REMAIN IN THE PREMISES. COURT WILL PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, HERBERT O THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1384 MCALLISTER STREET, #1-A, S.F. CA $2,507.44 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,507.44, STAYED UNTIL OCT-02-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT INCLUDES $13.16 TO BE PAID BY DEFT FROM 8/12/93. IF JUDGMENT AMOUNT IS PAID ON OR BEFORE 10/2/93, PLAINTIFF WILL SE ASIDE JUGDMENT AND DEFT CAN REMAIN IN THE PREMISES.
PHOTOCOPY FOR 1 COPY FOR CASE NUMBER 094628. PLTF COPY. FOR PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, A. A.
